description: Global presence count and percentage per Platinum substage across all wells.
sql:
SELECT * FROM (
WITH normalized_labels AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    p.name AS well_name,
    p.stage_num_td AS stage_num,
    CASE
      WHEN LOWER(p.substage) IN ('design', 'slurry') THEN 'design'
      WHEN LOWER(p.substage) IN ('shut_off', 'shutoff', 'shut_off_period') THEN 'shut_off'
      ELSE LOWER(p.substage)
    END AS substage_key
  FROM featurestore:merged_platinum_labels_v1 p
  WHERE p.stage_num_td IS NOT NULL
    AND p.substage IS NOT NULL
    AND LOWER(p.substage) <> 'na'
),
total AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT (well_name, stage_num)) AS total_stages
  FROM normalized_labels
),
presence_counts AS (
  SELECT substage_key, COUNT(DISTINCT (well_name, stage_num)) AS present_count
  FROM normalized_labels
  GROUP BY substage_key
),
substage_catalog AS (
  SELECT 1 AS sort_order, 'stage_start' AS substage_key, 'Stage Start' AS substage_label
  UNION ALL SELECT 2, 'ramp_up', 'Ramp Up'
  UNION ALL SELECT 3, 'design', 'Design'
  UNION ALL SELECT 4, 'ramp_down', 'Ramp Down'
  UNION ALL SELECT 5, 'shut_off', 'Shut-Off'
  UNION ALL SELECT 6, 'stage_end', 'Stage End'
)
SELECT
  c.sort_order,
  c.substage_key,
  c.substage_label,
  COALESCE(p.present_count, 0) AS present_count,
  t.total_stages,
  ROUND(
    COALESCE(COALESCE(p.present_count, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(t.total_stages, 0), 0)::numeric,
    1
  ) AS presence_percent,
  'All Wells' AS scope_label
FROM substage_catalog c
CROSS JOIN total t
LEFT JOIN presence_counts p ON p.substage_key = c.substage_key
ORDER BY c.sort_order
) q
